violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Did not observe any sanitizer buckets prepared in the back area during the inspection. Employees were actively slicing meats and dishing up meats.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Observed 3 comp sink is leaking into a bucket
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Observed black olives and peppers in the hand sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Observed no hand towel in the hand sink right by the cash register.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..)* were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. Observed cardboard on the ceiling where air condition line ran. Not a cleanable surface. The ceiling fan by the walk in cooler loose hang debris on it.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Observed missing ceiling tiles in the back of kitchen the the walk in freezer area. Also the ceiling tiles that were there were acoustic style. Observed the vent above the ovens are discolored.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles missing above the walk in cooler exposing the attic.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
